name: Deep research: Eliminate user and AI friction in CodeStory skill-first repo explanation across Sourcetrail, rootandruntime, and CodeStory.

promotion.label: exploratory
reasons: New packet evidence is exploratory until repeat, holdout, breadth, or promotion-gate metadata is recorded.

asi.hypothesis: Semantic token budgeting, clearer doctor health, repo-overview ask fallback, resolver consistency, output labels, and skill recipe updates remove the accepted manual-test friction checklist.
asi.evidence: Autoresearch packet packet-1-089c8d5afed0 parsed quality_gap=0 and repos_checked=3 with checks passing; two prior fresh full manual harness rounds also emitted quality_gap=0.
asi.risk: The benchmark covers the current accepted checklist and three fixed repos; new high-impact friction can still appear in future discovery rounds.
asi.expected_delta: quality_gap 3 to 0 after broad ask fallback, following semantic/doc/query/output/skill fixes.
asi.next_action_hint: Log this keep, mark the current quality-gap checklist closed, then use future autoresearch packets for fresh discovery if new P0/P1/P2 friction appears.
